svg.text: Joystick controller — CD4021 parallel-in / serial-out + 74HC04 turbo & slow oscillators
Two-inverter CMOS astable (RCA ICAN-6267): Rs at the input, timing R between the gates, C at the output — one 74HC04 makes three.
TURBO (A, B): the switch swaps the button's return from ground to the
oscillator, so auto-fire happens only while the button is held + turbo on.
SLOW: drives START continuously when on — no Start press needed.
